home.title: Discover Movies & TV Shows
home.subtitle: Explore comprehensive information about your favorite movies and TV series, including every episode.

movie.faqWhereWatch: Where can I watch {title} full version?
movie.faqWhereWatchAnswer: You are currently browsing the details page for {title}. FullWatch provides the latest movie and TV show information aggregation, where you can free view complete plot summaries, cast info, and ratings.
movie.faqIsFree: Is {title} available to watch online for free?
movie.faqIsFreeAnswer: FullWatch is a free movie and TV show information aggregation platform that provides detailed information, plot summaries, and cast lists. We do not provide video playback services, only information navigation.
movie.faqCast: Who are the main cast members of {title}?
movie.faqCastAnswer: You can view the main cast information for {title} in the Cast section on this page, including actor names, character roles, and profile photos.

tv.faqWhereWatch: Where can I watch {name} full version online?
tv.faqWhereWatchAnswer: You are currently browsing the details page for {name}. FullWatch provides the latest TV show information aggregation, where you can free view complete plot summaries, season lists, and ratings.
tv.faqIsFree: Is {name} available to watch online for free?
tv.faqIsFreeAnswer: FullWatch is a free movie and TV show information aggregation platform that provides detailed information, plot summaries, and cast lists. We do not provide video playback services, only information navigation.
tv.faqSeasonsAnswer: You can view all seasons of {name} in the Seasons section on this page. Click any season to see the full episode list for that season.

episode.faqEpisodeAnswer: This is Season {season}, Episode {episode} of {showName}, titled '{name}'.
episode.faqNextEpisodeAnswer: You can use the navigation buttons at the bottom of the page to jump to the next episode, or return to the show overview to select any episode.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
